tagged_types.name: Instance
tagged_types.code: type Instance is new Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type with private;

subprograms.name: Length
subprograms.code:
function Length (Stream : in Instance)
                return Ada.Streams.Stream_Element_Offset

subprograms.name: Length
subprograms.code: function Length (Stream : in Instance) return Natural

                Item   :    out Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Unbounded_String)
